files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,783 @@
+# SOME DESCRIPTIVE TITLE.
+# Copyright (C) 2026, vllm-ascend team
+# This file is distributed under the same license as the vllm-ascend package.
+# FIRST AUTHOR <EMAIL@ADDRESS>, 2026.
+#
+msgid ""
+msgstr ""
+"Project-Id-Version: vllm-ascend\n"
+"Report-Msgid-Bugs-To: \n"
+"POT-Creation-Date: 2026-07-10 04:12+0000\n"
+"PO-Revision-Date: 2026-07-10 04:12+0000\n"
+"Last-Translator: \n"
+"Language-Team: zh_CN <LL@li.org>\n"
+"Language: zh_CN\n"
+"MIME-Version: 1.0\n"
+"Content-Type: text/plain; charset=utf-8\n"
+"Content-Transfer-Encoding: 8bit\n"
+"Plural-Forms: nplurals=1; plural=0;\n"
+"Generated-By: detect_po_changes.py\n"
+
+msgid "# Balance Schedule Refactor"
+msgstr "# 平衡调度重构"
+
+msgid ""
+"**TL;DR** The existing `patch_balance_schedule.py` copied three large upstream\n"
+"units verbatim to inject roughly 5 lines of real logic: `Scheduler.schedule()`\n"
+"(~520 lines), `DPEngineCoreProc.run_busy_loop()` (~40 lines), and\n"
+"`EngineCoreProc.run_engine_core()` (~55 lines). This refactor, while **strictly\n"
+"preserving the `balance_flag` semantics**, first deletes the two already-stale\n"
+"copies `run_busy_loop()` / `run_engine_core()` (replacing them with an engine\n"
+"core hook on `_has_global_unfinished_reqs` plus a module-level name swap for\n"
+"conditional activation). The `schedule()` copy is **kept for now** — upstream\n"
+"exposes no finer-grained hook to borrow, and deleting it depends on contributing\n"
+"an override seam upstream, tracked as later Phase 2B. The file therefore does\n"
+"not shrink to a few dozen lines: the `schedule()` body is still a verbatim\n"
+"upstream copy (**aligned verbatim to release tag `v0.23.0`**, with only 3\n"
+"balance deltas), and the file is ~830 lines. Aligning to a stable release tag\n"
+"(rather than a moving main-verified commit hash) makes \"verbatim comparison\n"
+"against upstream\" a reproducible drift check — a fixed tag points at the same\n"
+"source on every CI run. What this round actually removes is the stale-drift\n"
+"risk of the `run_busy_loop` / `run_engine_core` copies, and fixes a\n"
+"balance-enabled deadlock (originally \"gather inside `schedule()`\", then in a\n"
+"later iteration \"gather inside `_process_engine_step`\"); gather now sits\n"
+"immediately after the `_has_global_unfinished_reqs` cross-rank all-reduce."
+msgstr ""
+"**摘要** 现有的 `patch_balance_schedule.py` "
+"逐字复制了三个大型上游单元，以注入大约5行实际逻辑：`Scheduler.schedule()`（约520行）、`DPEngineCoreProc.run_busy_loop()`（约40行）和"
+" `EngineCoreProc.run_engine_core()`（约55行）。本次重构在**严格保留 `balance_flag` "
+"语义**的前提下，首先删除了两个已经过时的副本 `run_busy_loop()` / `run_engine_core()`（将其替换为基于 "
+"`_has_global_unfinished_reqs` 的引擎核心钩子，以及用于条件激活的模块级名称交换）。`schedule()` "
+"的副本**暂时保留**——上游没有提供更细粒度的钩子供借用，删除它依赖于向上游贡献一个覆盖接缝，计划在后续的 Phase 2B "
+"中完成。因此，该文件并未缩减到几十行：`schedule()` 的主体仍然是上游的逐字副本（**与发布标签 `v0.23.0` "
+"逐字对齐**，仅包含3处平衡增量），文件约830行。与稳定的发布标签（而非变动的主分支验证提交哈希）对齐，使得“与上游逐字比较”成为可复现的漂移检查——固定标签在每次CI运行中都指向相同的源代码。本轮实际移除的是"
+" `run_busy_loop` / `run_engine_core` 副本的陈旧漂移风险，并修复了一个启用平衡时的死锁（最初是“在 "
+"`schedule()` 内部收集”，后来在一次迭代中改为“在 `_process_engine_step` 内部收集”）；收集操作现在紧跟在 "
+"`_has_global_unfinished_reqs` 跨秩全归约之后。"
+
+msgid "## Background"
+msgstr "## 背景"
+
+msgid "### What Balance Scheduling does"
+msgstr "### 平衡调度的作用"
+
+msgid ""
+"With a large `data-parallel-size` and concurrency ≈ `DP × max-num-seqs`,\n"
+"requests tend to pile up on a subset of DP ranks: the saturated ranks carry\n"
+"prefill and decode at once and slow down, while the other ranks keep admitting\n"
+"new requests, widening the gap. Balance scheduling does **not** actively\n"
+"rebalance the per-rank running counts. Instead it provides a **global admission\n"
+"gate**: as soon as **any one rank's** running count reaches the cap, **all\n"
+"ranks** stop admitting new requests from the WAITING queue, giving the\n"
+"saturated rank a chance to drain its in-flight requests so the gap stops\n"
+"growing. It is **not** \"make the lagging ranks catch up to the leader\" (that\n"
+"semantic is **explicitly rejected** here — see\n"
+"[Behavior-preservation contract](#behavior-preservation-contract), item 1)."
+msgstr ""
+"当 `data-parallel-size` 较大且并发度 ≈ `DP × max-num-seqs` "
+"时，请求往往会堆积在部分DP秩上：饱和的秩同时处理预填充和解码，速度变慢，而其他秩则不断接纳新请求，导致差距扩大。平衡调度**不会**主动重新平衡每个秩的运行计数。相反，它提供了一个**全局准入门控**：一旦**任何一个秩**的运行计数达到上限，**所有秩**都停止从WAITING队列接纳新请求，让饱和的秩有机会排空其正在处理的请求，从而阻止差距继续扩大。它**不是**“让落后的秩追上领先的秩”（该语义在此处**被明确拒绝**——请参见[行为保持契约](#behavior-"
+"preservation-contract)第1条）。"
+
+msgid ""
+"The feature is enabled via `additional_config.enable_balance_scheduling = true`\n"
+"(the environment variable `VLLM_ASCEND_BALANCE_SCHEDULING` is deprecated). It\n"
+"supports PD-mixed mode only; validation lives in `vllm_ascend/platform.py` and\n"
+"`vllm_ascend/ascend_config.py`."
+msgstr ""
+"该功能通过 `additional_config.enable_balance_scheduling = true` 启用（环境变量 "
+"`VLLM_ASCEND_BALANCE_SCHEDULING` 已弃用）。它仅支持PD混合模式；验证逻辑位于 "
+"`vllm_ascend/platform.py` 和 `vllm_ascend/ascend_config.py` 中。"
+
+msgid "### The real logic (only two spots)"
+msgstr "### 实际逻辑（仅两处）"
+
+msgid "The whole feature reduces to two operations:"
+msgstr "整个功能归结为两个操作："
+
+msgid ""
+"1. **Cross-rank sync of the running count** — one `all_gather` per engine step,\n"
+"   collecting each rank's `len(self.running)`:"
+msgstr ""
+"1. **运行计数的跨秩同步** — 每个引擎步骤执行一次 `all_gather`，收集每个秩的 `len(self.running)`："
+
+msgid ""
+"2. **The admission gate inside the WAITING scheduling loop** — because every\n"
+"   rank holds the same gathered vector, this check yields the same result on\n"
+"   every rank. Whenever **any rank's** running count reached the cap at the end\n"
+"   of the previous step, **all ranks** stop admitting new WAITING requests this\n"
+"   step:"
+msgstr ""
+"2. **WAITING调度循环内部的准入门控** — "
+"由于每个秩都持有相同的收集向量，此检查在每个秩上产生相同的结果。只要在上一步骤结束时**任何一个秩的**运行计数达到上限，**所有秩**在此步骤中都停止接纳新的WAITING请求："
+
+msgid ""
+"**Semantic (must be preserved bit-for-bit):** \"leader-at-cap ⇒ global freeze\n"
+"   of admission\". It is **not** \"make lagging ranks catch up to the leader\". See\n"
+"   [Behavior-preservation contract](#behavior-preservation-contract)."
+msgstr ""
+"**语义（必须逐位保留）：** \"领先者达到上限 ⇒ 全局冻结准入\"。它**不是** "
+"\"让落后的秩追上领先的秩\"。请参见[行为保持契约](#behavior-preservation-contract)。"
+
+msgid "## Problem statement"
+msgstr "## 问题陈述"
+
+msgid ""
+"To inject the two pieces above, the existing `patch_balance_schedule.py` copied\n"
+"three large upstream units verbatim:"
+msgstr "为了注入上述两个片段，现有的 `patch_balance_schedule.py` 逐字复制了三个大型上游单元："
+
+msgid ""
+"| Copied unit                        | Lines | Reason for copying"
+"                                |"
+msgstr ""
+"| 复制的单元                         | 行数  | 复制原因"
+"                                          |"
+
+msgid ""
+"| `Scheduler.schedule()`             | ~520  | Insert the 3-line "
+"`balance_flag` gate mid-loop    |"
+msgstr ""
+"| `Scheduler.schedule()`             | ~520  | 在循环中间插入3行的 `balance_flag` 门控"
+"            |"
+
+msgid ""
+"| `DPEngineCoreProc.run_busy_loop()` | ~40   | Call `balance_gather` after "
+"every step            |"
+msgstr ""
+"| `DPEngineCoreProc.run_busy_loop()` | ~40   | 在每一步之后调用 `balance_gather`"
+"                  |"
+
+msgid ""
+"| `EngineCoreProc.run_engine_core()` | ~55   | Replace with "
+"`BalanceDPEngineCoreProc` when DP>1  |"
+msgstr ""
+"| `EngineCoreProc.run_engine_core()` | ~55   | 当DP>1时替换为 "
+"`BalanceDPEngineCoreProc`           |"
+
+msgid "This \"copy whole units\" approach has three concrete harms:"
+msgstr "这种“复制整个单元”的方法有三个具体危害："
+
+msgid ""
+"1. **The `schedule()` copy is now aligned verbatim to a release tag (the\n"
+"   production pin, currently `v0.23.0`).** The **single source of truth** for\n"
+"   the release tag is `.github/vllm-release-tag.commit` (CI reads the same file\n"
+"   via `tr -d '[:space:]' < .github/vllm-release-tag.commit`), currently\n"
+"   `v0.23.0`; dev/CI actually installs the main-verified commit pointed at by\n"
+"   `.github/vllm-main-verified.commit` (which already carries `throttle_prefills`\n"
+"   and other v0.23.1+ evolution). The old patch copied a `schedule()` from an\n"
+"   older vLLM than v0.23.0, so it was stale as a whole. This round aligns the\n"
+"   `schedule()` copy **verbatim to the release tag's `Scheduler.schedule()`**,\n"
+"   keeping only the 3 balance deltas (disabled-path early return,\n"
+"   `balance_flag` gate, `if request_queue is None: break`); the\n"
+"   `run_busy_loop()` / `run_engine_core()` copies were deleted in Phase 1.\n"
+"   **Note: any concrete `v0.23.0` in this document is just a snapshot of the pin\n"
+"   file's current value — it goes stale as the pin advances and must NOT be\n"
+"   used as a version authority; any code/test that needs this tag must read the\n"
+"   file at runtime.**"
+msgstr ""
+"1. **`schedule()` 的副本现已与发布标签（生产固定版本，当前为 `v0.23.0`）逐字对齐。** 发布标签的**唯一真实来源**是 "
+"`.github/vllm-release-tag.commit`（CI通过 `tr -d '[:space:]' < .github/vllm-"
+"release-tag.commit` 读取同一文件），当前为 `v0.23.0`；开发/CI实际安装的是 `.github/vllm-main-"
+"verified.commit` 指向的主分支验证提交（该提交已包含 `throttle_prefills` 和其他 v0.23.1+ "
+"的演进）。旧补丁复制了一个比 v0.23.0 更旧的 vLLM 中的 `schedule()`，因此整体已经过时。本轮将 `schedule()` "
+"副本**逐字对齐到发布标签的 `Scheduler.schedule()`**，仅保留3处平衡增量（禁用路径的提前返回、`balance_flag` "
+"门控、`if request_queue is None: break`）；`run_busy_loop()` / "
+"`run_engine_core()` 的副本已在 Phase 1 中删除。**注意：本文档中任何具体的 `v0.23.0` "
+"只是固定版本文件当前值的快照——随着固定版本推进它会过时，绝不能用作版本权威依据；任何需要此标签的代码/测试必须在运行时读取该文件。**"
+
+msgid ""
+"**Why align to the v0.23.0 tag rather than the installed main-verified\n"
+"   commit?** Two reasons: (a) production actually runs the v0.23.0 release, so\n"
+"   aligning the copy to it keeps production behavior consistent with runtime;\n"
+"   (b) a fixed git tag points at the **same** source on every CI run, so\n"
+"   \"verbatim comparison of the copy against upstream (allowing only the 3\n"
+"   deltas)\" becomes a **reproducible** drift check — whereas a moving\n"
+"   main-verified hash makes the comparison drift forward with every commit and\n"
+"   cannot serve as a stable guardrail."
+msgstr ""
+"**为什么对齐到 v0.23.0 标签而不是已安装的 main-verified 提交？** 两个原因：(a) 生产环境实际运行的是 v0.23.0 "
+"版本，因此将副本对齐到该版本可保持生产行为与运行时一致；(b) 固定的 git 标签在每次 CI "
+"运行时都指向**相同**的源码，因此“对副本与上游进行逐字比较（仅允许 3 处差异）”成为**可重现**的漂移检查——而移动的 main-"
+"verified 哈希会随着每次提交向前漂移，无法作为稳定的护栏。"
+
+msgid ""
+"**Cost and boundary:** the copy (v0.23.0 logic) and the main-verified\n"
+"   runtime differ slightly in behavior, but balance's real scheduling path is\n"
+"   only reached under NPU + DP + MoE, never by CPU UT (see Test plan); and\n"
+"   those differences do not affect the gate's own semantics. **Key: vllm-ascend\n"
+"   CI runs two vllm versions at once** (release tag v0.23.0 + main-verified\n"
+"   commit 1f486d96), whose engines call `schedule()` differently — v0.23.0 calls\n"
+"   `schedule()`, 1f486d96 calls `schedule(throttle_prefills)`. So the override\n"
+"   signature takes the **union of both versions**\n"
+"   (`schedule(self, throttle_prefills=False)`, a default-carrying superset) so\n"
+"   both engines can call it; the disabled path delegates to `super()` and uses\n"
+"   **signature introspection** (`_SUPER_SCHEDULE_HAS_THROTTLE`, decided once at\n"
+"   import) to decide whether to forward `throttle_prefills`, rather than a\n"
+"   version string — this is correct on both lanes and is not affected by a dev\n"
+"   checkout's non-standard PEP 440 `__version__` (which would make\n"
+"   `vllm_version_is` raise). I.e.: **body aligned to the release tag; signature\n"
+"   takes the two-version union; disabled path uses signature introspection.**"
+msgstr ""
+"**代价与边界：** 副本（v0.23.0 逻辑）与 main-verified 运行时的行为略有差异，但 balance 的实际调度路径仅在 NPU "
+"+ DP + MoE 下触发，CPU 单元测试不会涉及（参见测试计划）；这些差异不影响门控本身的语义。**关键点：vllm-ascend CI "
+"同时运行两个 vllm 版本**（发布标签 v0.23.0 + main-verified 提交 1f486d96），它们的引擎调用 "
+"`schedule()` 的方式不同——v0.23.0 调用 `schedule()`，1f486d96 调用 "
+"`schedule(throttle_prefills)`。因此，重写签名采用**两个版本的并集**（`schedule(self, "
+"throttle_prefills=False)`，一个带默认值的超集），使得两个引擎都能调用它；禁用路径委托给 `super()` "
+"并使用**签名自省**（`_SUPER_SCHEDULE_HAS_THROTTLE`，在导入时决定一次）来决定是否传递 "
+"`throttle_prefills`，而不是使用版本字符串——这在两条路径上都是正确的，并且不受开发检出分支的非标准 PEP 440 "
+"`__version__` 影响（后者会导致 `vllm_version_is` "
+"抛出异常）。即：**主体对齐发布标签；签名采用两版本并集；禁用路径使用签名自省。**"
+
+msgid ""
+"2. **It violates the `AGENTS.md` patch policy.** The policy requires patches to\n"
+"   be \"minimal and focused\" with \"a long-term plan to contribute upstream\". A\n"
+"   500-line verbatim copy is unreviewable (you cannot see the real change\n"
+"   without diffing against upstream) and must be re-synced by hand on every vLLM\n"
+"   upgrade."
+msgstr ""
+"2. **它违反了 `AGENTS.md` 补丁策略。** 该策略要求补丁“最小且聚焦”，并“有长期计划向上游贡献”。一个 500 "
+"行的逐字副本是无法审查的（不对比上游差异就无法看到真正的改动），并且每次 vLLM 升级都必须手动重新同步。"
+
+msgid ""
+"3. **Silent, undocumented deviations accumulate.** For example the override\n"
+"   quietly turned upstream's `assert request_queue is not None` into\n"
+"   `if request_queue is None: break`. Such deviations make future diffs\n"
+"   untrustworthy."
+msgstr ""
+"3. **静默且未记录的偏差会累积。** 例如，重写悄悄地将上游的 `assert request_queue is not None` 改成了 `if"
+" request_queue is None: break`。此类偏差会使未来的差异变得不可信。"
+
+msgid ""
+"> Lesson learned this round (a pit we hit — `schedule()` signature drift across\n"
+"> versions + dual-version CI). vLLM's `Scheduler.schedule()` signature changes\n"
+"> across versions: release tag **v0.23.0** is `schedule(self)` (engine calls\n"
+"> `schedule()`), main-verified commit **1f486d96** adds\n"
+"> `throttle_prefills: bool = False` (engine calls\n"
+"> `schedule(self._should_throttle_prefills())`). And **vllm-ascend CI runs both\n"
+"> at once**, so the override cannot hardcode either signature — `schedule(self)`\n"
+"> would `TypeError` on 1f486d96 when the engine passes the arg. The right fix:\n"
+"> the override signature takes the **union of both versions**\n"
+"> `def schedule(self, throttle_prefills: bool = False)` (a default-carrying\n"
+"> superset callable by both engines); the disabled path delegates to `super()`\n"
+"> and uses **signature introspection** (computed once at import:\n"
+"> `_SUPER_SCHEDULE_HAS_THROTTLE = \"throttle_prefills\" in inspect.signature(Scheduler.schedule).parameters`)\n"
+"> to decide whether to forward `throttle_prefills`, instead of a\n"
+"> `vllm_version_is(\"0.23.0\")` version string — the latter raises `ValueError`\n"
+"> on a dev checkout (non-PEP 440 `__version__`) and fundamentally reframes the\n"
+"> factual question \"does super() accept this arg?\" as a brittle \"does the\n"
+"> version string match?\". Conclusion: **when CI runs multiple upstream versions\n"
+"> at once, take the union for override signatures and drive version-dependent\n"
+"> branches by signature introspection, not version strings.** At the unit-test\n"
+"> level, \"signature equals installed vLLM's\" is **wrong** under dual versions\n"
+"> (the two lanes' installed signatures differ by definition, so an equality\n"
+"> assertion can only ever pass on one lane); it is replaced by \"the override is\n"
+"> bindable by both engines' call shapes and is a superset of the installed\n"
+"> signature\"."
+msgstr ""
+"> 本轮经验教训（我们遇到的一个坑——`schedule()` 签名在不同版本间漂移 + 双版本 CI）。vLLM 的 "
+"`Scheduler.schedule()` 签名在不同版本间会变化：发布标签 **v0.23.0** 是 `schedule(self)`（引擎调用 "
+"`schedule()`），main-verified 提交 **1f486d96** 增加了 `throttle_prefills: bool = "
+"False`（引擎调用 `schedule(self._should_throttle_prefills())`）。而 **vllm-ascend CI"
+" 同时运行两者**，因此重写不能硬编码任一签名——`schedule(self)` 在 1f486d96 上，当引擎传入参数时会引发 "
+"`TypeError`。正确的修复：重写签名采用**两个版本的并集** `def schedule(self, throttle_prefills: "
+"bool = False)`（一个带默认值的超集，两个引擎都能调用）；禁用路径委托给 `super()` "
+"并使用**签名自省**（在导入时计算一次：`_SUPER_SCHEDULE_HAS_THROTTLE = \"throttle_prefills\" "
+"in inspect.signature(Scheduler.schedule).parameters`）来决定是否传递 "
+"`throttle_prefills`，而不是使用 `vllm_version_is(\"0.23.0\")` 版本字符串——后者在开发检出分支（非 "
+"PEP 440 `__version__`）上会引发 `ValueError`，并且从根本上将事实性问题“super() "
+"接受这个参数吗？”重构为脆弱的“版本字符串匹配吗？”。结论：**当 CI "
+"同时运行多个上游版本时，重写签名采用并集，版本相关的分支由签名自省驱动，而非版本字符串。** 在单元测试层面，“签名等于已安装 vLLM "
+"的签名”在双版本下是**错误**的（两条路径的已安装签名定义上就不同，因此相等性断言永远只能通过一条路径）；它被替换为“重写可被两个引擎的调用形态绑定，并且是已安装签名的超集”。"
+
+msgid "## Design"
+msgstr "## 设计"
+
+msgid "### Principle"
+msgstr "### 原则"
+
+msgid ""
+"Remove copies, not the feature. Pull gather into the scheduler itself (so the\n"
+"two EngineCore copies can be deleted), and in the future inject the gate via a\n"
+"minimal upstream seam (so the `schedule()` copy can be deleted). The\n"
+"`balance_flag` semantics stay strictly unchanged."
+msgstr ""
+"移除副本，而非功能。将收集逻辑拉入调度器本身（这样两个 EngineCore 副本就可以删除），并在未来通过一个最小的上游接缝注入门控（这样 "
+"`schedule()` 副本就可以删除）。`balance_flag` 语义严格保持不变。"
+
+msgid ""
+"### Implementation status and corrections (this round landed Phase 1 + 2A + "
+"3)"
+msgstr "### 实现状态与修正（本轮落地了阶段 1 + 2A + 3）"
+
+msgid ""
+"While implementing, we verified upstream's real structure and found two\n"
+"drafting assumptions did not hold; both are corrected here:"
+msgstr "在实现过程中，我们验证了上游的实际结构，发现两个草案假设不成立；两者均已在此修正："
+
+msgid ""
+"- **Upstream `Scheduler` has no `new_step_starts()` lifecycle hook** (that is a\n"
+"  `kv_cache_manager` method) and no \"per-step scheduling start\" overridable\n"
+"  seam. So gather cannot live inside `schedule()` (see the deadlock lesson in\n"
+"  [Step 1 — Hook gather onto `_has_global_unfinished_reqs` and delete the EngineCore copies](#step-1--hook-gather-onto-_has_global_unfinished_reqs-and-delete-the-enginecore-copies));\n"
+"  it lives on the engine core's `_has_global_unfinished_reqs` instead.\n"
+"- **The scheduler cannot lazily fetch the DP group:** `dp_group` is produced in\n"
+"  `_init_data_parallel` (earlier than scheduler creation) and there is no global\n"
+"  registry. So `BalanceDPEngineCoreProc` is **not deleted** but slimmed to a\n"
+"  subclass that overrides `_has_global_unfinished_reqs` (injects `dp_group` +\n"
+"  calls `balance_gather` once); the `run_engine_core` copy is replaced by\n"
+"  patching the module-level `DPEngineCoreProc` name (upstream's `run_engine_core`\n"
+"  resolves this class by module-global name at call time), and the swap happens\n"
+"  **only when balance is enabled** (conditional activation)."
+msgstr ""
+"- **上游 `Scheduler` 没有 `new_step_starts()` 生命周期钩子**（这是 `kv_cache_manager` 的方法），也没有可覆盖的“每步调度开始”接缝。因此 `gather` 不能放在 `schedule()` 内部（参见[步骤 1 — 将 gather 挂接到 `_has_global_unfinished_reqs` 并删除 EngineCore 副本](#step-1--hook-gather-onto-_has_global_unfinished_reqs-and-delete-the-enginecore-copies)中的死锁教训）；而是放在引擎核心的 `_has_global_unfinished_reqs` 上。\n"
+"- **调度器无法延迟获取 DP 组：** `dp_group` 在 `_init_data_parallel` 中生成（早于调度器创建），且没有全局注册表。因此 `BalanceDPEngineCoreProc` **不会被删除**，而是精简为一个覆盖 `_has_global_unfinished_reqs` 的子类（注入 `dp_group` 并调用一次 `balance_gather`）；`run_engine_core` 的副本被替换为修补模块级 `DPEngineCoreProc` 名称（上游的 `run_engine_core` 在调用时通过模块全局名称解析此类），且此替换**仅在启用 balance 时发生**（条件激活）。"
+
+msgid ""
+"Accordingly the Phase 1 description and the \"post-refactor file shape\" below are\n"
+"both rewritten to match the actual implementation. Phase 3 collapses config\n"
+"probing to two fallbacks (AscendConfig → additional_config) and **removes the\n"
+"direct environment-variable read** — `VLLM_ASCEND_BALANCE_SCHEDULING` is still\n"
+"parsed centrally by `AscendConfig` (as a deprecated fallback for\n"
+"`additional_config`), but `_balance_scheduling_enabled` no longer reads it\n"
+"itself, bypassing `AscendConfig`. Details in\n"
+"[Phased rollout](#phased-rollout)."
+msgstr ""
+"因此，下面的阶段 1 描述和“重构后的文件结构”都已重写以匹配实际实现。阶段 3 将配置探测简化为两个回退（AscendConfig → "
+"additional_config），并**移除了直接的环境变量读取**——`VLLM_ASCEND_BALANCE_SCHEDULING` 仍由 "
+"`AscendConfig` 集中解析（作为 `additional_config` 的已弃用回退），但 "
+"`_balance_scheduling_enabled` 不再自行读取它，从而绕过了 "
+"`AscendConfig`。详情请参见[分阶段推出](#phased-rollout)。"
+
+msgid ""
+"### Step 1 — Hook gather onto `_has_global_unfinished_reqs` and delete the "
+"EngineCore copies"
+msgstr ""
+"### 步骤 1 — 将 gather 挂接到 `_has_global_unfinished_reqs` 并删除 EngineCore 副本"
+
+msgid ""
+"The old `BalanceDPEngineCoreProc.run_busy_loop()` and `run_engine_core()` were\n"
+"verbatim copies of upstream methods and **already stale-drifted**: upstream\n"
+"`run_busy_loop` switched to `while self._handle_shutdown()`, added\n"
+"`eep_scaling_state` / `is_sleeping` guards and a trailing `raise SystemExit`,\n"
+"while the patch still had `while True` + a hand-written signal handler;\n"
+"`run_engine_core` similarly gained `SignalCallback`, numa, tracer logic. The\n"
+"goal is to delete both copies."
+msgstr ""
+"旧的 `BalanceDPEngineCoreProc.run_busy_loop()` 和 `run_engine_core()` "
+"是上游方法的逐字副本，并且**已经过时偏离**：上游的 `run_busy_loop` 切换为 `while "
+"self._handle_shutdown()`，添加了 `eep_scaling_state` / `is_sleeping` 保护以及尾随的 "
+"`raise SystemExit`，而补丁仍然使用 `while True` 和手写的信号处理器；`run_engine_core` 同样增加了 "
+"`SignalCallback`、numa、tracer 逻辑。目标是删除这两个副本。"
+
+msgid "Three constraints surfaced during implementation:"
+msgstr "实现过程中出现了三个约束条件："
+
+msgid ""
+"1. **The scheduler cannot obtain the DP group itself.** `dp_group` is created by\n"
+"   `parallel_config.stateless_init_dp_group()` inside\n"
+"   `DPEngineCoreProc._init_data_parallel` and stored on the engine core; that\n"
+"   method runs in `EngineCoreProc.__init__` **before** `super().__init__()`\n"
+"   (which creates the scheduler), and there is no registry for lazy lookup. So\n"
+"   the engine core must hand `dp_group` to the scheduler.\n"
+"2. **`balance_gather` must run on every rank on every iteration** that is part\n"
+"   of an active (non-idle) wave (see the deadlock lessons below). `schedule()`\n"
+"   does not satisfy this — a rank that has drained locally takes a dummy batch\n"
+"   and never enters `schedule()`.\n"
+"3. **Balance must not invade configs that do not enable it** (e.g. PD-disaggregated\n"
+"   recompute / `AsyncRecomputeScheduler`), so the `BalanceDPEngineCoreProc`\n"
+"   swap must be conditional."
+msgstr ""
+"1. **调度器无法自行获取 DP 组。** `dp_group` 由 `DPEngineCoreProc._init_data_parallel` 内部的 `parallel_config.stateless_init_dp_group()` 创建，并存储在引擎核心上；该方法在 `EngineCoreProc.__init__` 中运行，**早于** `super().__init__()`（后者创建调度器），并且没有用于延迟查找的注册表。因此，引擎核心必须将 `dp_group` 传递给调度器。\n"
+"2. **`balance_gather` 必须在每个活跃（非空闲）wave 的每次迭代中的每个 rank 上运行**（参见下面的死锁教训）。`schedule()` 不满足此要求——一个本地已排空的 rank 会获取一个虚拟批次，并且永远不会进入 `schedule()`。\n"
+"3. **Balance 不得侵入未启用它的配置**（例如，PD 分离的重计算 / `AsyncRecomputeScheduler`），因此 `BalanceDPEngineCoreProc` 的替换必须是有条件的。"
+
+msgid "The final landing is therefore:"
+msgstr "因此，最终的落地方案是："
+
+msgid ""
+"- **`balance_gather` is pulled into `BalanceScheduler`** (no-arg signature, uses\n"
+"  `self.dp_group`), but **not called from `schedule()`** — the engine core\n"
+"  triggers it per step (see below).\n"
+"- **`BalanceDPEngineCoreProc` is not deleted but slimmed to one override**: it\n"
+"  hooks `_has_global_unfinished_reqs`, calling `super()._has_global_unfinished_reqs()`\n"
+"  first (which runs the cross-rank all-reduce every 32 steps) and then, still\n"
+"  inside that same call, injecting `dp_group` and calling `balance_gather()`\n"
+"  once. Upstream's `run_busy_loop` calls `_has_global_unfinished_reqs` exactly\n"
+"  once per iteration on every non-idle path (including dummy-batch iterations\n"
+"  where a drained rank never enters `schedule()`), so every rank participates in\n"
+"  the gather every active step. The `run_busy_loop` body is no longer copied.\n"
+"- **The `run_engine_core` copy is deleted entirely.** Upstream's `run_engine_core`\n"
+"  (a staticmethod) resolves `DPEngineCoreProc` by module-global name inside its\n"
+"  body (`engine_core = DPEngineCoreProc(*args, **kwargs)`, see\n"
+"  [vllm/v1/engine/core.py](https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm)). So a thin\n"
+"  wrapper wraps `run_engine_core`: at its entry (where `vllm_config` is\n"
+"  available) it decides, via `_balance_scheduling_enabled`, whether to swap the\n"
+"  module-level `DPEngineCoreProc` to `BalanceDPEngineCoreProc` or restore the\n"
+"  upstream original, then calls the original `run_engine_core`. This is\n"
+"  **conditional activation** — with balance off, upstream's implementation is\n"
+"  used verbatim; signal handling, `SignalCallback`, numa, and tracer all stay\n"
+"  upstream-correct."
+msgstr ""
+"- **`balance_gather` 被拉入 `BalanceScheduler`**（无参数签名，使用 `self.dp_group`），但**不是从 `schedule()` 中调用**——引擎核心每步触发它（见下文）。\n"
+"- **`BalanceDPEngineCoreProc` 不会被删除，而是精简为一个覆盖**：它挂接 `_has_global_unfinished_reqs`，首先调用 `super()._has_global_unfinished_reqs()`（每 32 步运行一次跨 rank 的 all-reduce），然后在同一调用内部注入 `dp_group` 并调用一次 `balance_gather()`。上游的 `run_busy_loop` 在每次迭代的每个非空闲路径上恰好调用一次 `_has_global_unfinished_reqs`（包括已排空 rank 永远不会进入 `schedule()` 的虚拟批次迭代），因此每个 rank 在每个活跃步骤都参与 gather。`run_busy_loop` 的主体不再被复制。\n"
+"- **`run_engine_core` 的副本被完全删除。** 上游的 `run_engine_core`（一个静态方法）在其主体内部通过模块全局名称解析 `DPEngineCoreProc`（`engine_core = DPEngineCoreProc(*args, **kwargs)`，参见 [vllm/v1/engine/core.py](https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm)）。因此，一个薄包装器包装了 `run_engine_core`：在其入口处（`vllm_config` 可用时），它通过 `_balance_scheduling_enabled` 决定是将模块级的 `DPEngineCoreProc` 替换为 `BalanceDPEngineCoreProc` 还是恢复上游原始版本，然后调用原始的 `run_engine_core`。这是**条件激活**——关闭 balance 时，逐字使用上游的实现；信号处理、`SignalCallback`、numa 和 tracer 都保持上游正确。"
+
+msgid ""
+"> **Lesson A — deadlock (gather must not live in `schedule()`).** An earlier\n"
+"> version put `balance_gather` at the top of `BalanceScheduler.schedule()` and\n"
+"> argued \"between two steps `self.running` only changes inside `schedule()` /\n"
+"> `update_from_output()`, so the snapshot is equivalent and there is still one\n"
+"> `all_gather` per step — safe\". That argument was **only half right**: the\n"
+"> value the gate sees is indeed equivalent, but it **ignored that `all_gather`\n"
+"> is a collective and every rank must participate synchronously**. Under DP MoE,\n"
+"> a rank that has drained its local requests (`has_requests()` is False) runs\n"
+"> `execute_dummy_batch()` and **never enters `schedule()`**, so it skips that\n"
+"> `all_gather` while a still-busy rank calls it and waits forever — **collective\n"
+"> mismatch, deadlock**. The fact that `_has_global_unfinished_reqs` only truly\n"
+"> all-reduces every 32 steps and that `engines_running` is sticky in between\n"
+"> widens this window.\n"
+">\n"
+"> **Lesson B — deadlock (gather must not live in `_process_engine_step` either;\n"
+"> it must sit immediately after the `_has_global_unfinished_reqs` all-reduce).**\n"
+"> A later iteration \"fixed\" Lesson A by moving gather into\n"
+"> `_process_engine_step` (called every iteration, before the sync and before\n"
+"> the idle `continue` gate). That **re-introduced a different deadlock**:\n"
+"> `_has_global_unfinished_reqs` is the **only** point in the busy loop that\n"
+"> re-synchronizes ranks on wave/idle state. Placing the every-step `all_gather`\n"
+"> **before** that sync (and before the idle `continue`) decouples the gather\n"
+"> from wave coordination. At wave boundaries — requests finishing at different\n"
+"> times per rank, `_process_input_queue` blocking on the next wave / new\n"
+"> requests, `engines_running` sticky for up to 32 steps — one rank can reach the\n"
+"> gather while another is still blocked in `_process_input_queue` or in\n"
+"> `future.result()`. The `all_gather` then deadlocks; the stuck EngineCore can\n"
+"> no longer drain its worker shared-memory broadcast channel, the worker's\n"
+"> `sample_tokens` response has nowhere to land, and after 60 s the engine dies\n"
+"> with `RPC call to sample_tokens timed out` (observed intermittently — \"5 GPQA\n"
+"> runs OK, 6th hangs\" — because the trigger depends on per-run completion\n"
+"> timing). This is independent of whether expert-parallel spans DP ranks: the\n"
+"> failure mechanism is EngineCore↔worker shm exhaustion, not a worker forward\n"
+"> pass. Conclusion: **`balance_gather` must sit immediately after\n"
+"> `super()._has_global_unfinished_reqs()`, the only per-iteration cross-rank\n"
+"> sync, so ranks enter the all-gather having just agreed on `engines_running`.**\n"
+"> Because `_has_global_unfinished_reqs` is only called on iterations that did\n"
+"> **not** take the idle `continue`, gather is skipped consistently by every\n"
+"> rank when all are idle (no rank does an extra gather) — identical to the\n"
+"> pre-refactor copied `run_busy_loop`, where gather sat right after the\n"
+"> all-reduce. The lesson is locked by the `_has_global_unfinished_reqs` seam\n"
+"> guard in the unit tests."
+msgstr ""
+"> **教训A — 死锁（gather不能存在于`schedule()`中）。** 早期版本将`balance_gather`放在`BalanceScheduler.schedule()`的顶部，并论证\"在两个步骤之间，`self.running`只在`schedule()`/`update_from_output()`内部变化，因此快照是等价的，每个步骤仍然只有一个`all_gather`——安全\"。这个论证**只对了一半**：gate看到的值确实等价，但它**忽略了`all_gather`是一个集合操作，每个rank必须同步参与**。在DP MoE下，一个已经耗尽本地请求的rank（`has_requests()`为False）会执行`execute_dummy_batch()`并且**永远不会进入`schedule()`**，因此它会跳过那个`all_gather`，而一个仍然繁忙的rank会调用它并永远等待——**集合不匹配，死锁**。`_has_global_unfinished_reqs`实际上每32步才进行一次真正的all-reduce，并且`engines_running`在此期间是粘性的，这一事实扩大了此窗口。\n"
+">\n"
+"> **教训B — 死锁（gather也不能存在于`_process_engine_step`中；它必须紧跟在`_has_global_unfinished_reqs` all-reduce之后）。** 后续的一次迭代通过将gather移动到`_process_engine_step`（每次迭代都调用，在同步之前和空闲`continue` gate之前）\"修复\"了教训A。这**重新引入了一个不同的死锁**：`_has_global_unfinished_reqs`是繁忙循环中**唯一**重新同步各rank关于波次/空闲状态的同步点。将每个步骤的`all_gather`放置在该同步**之前**（以及在空闲`continue`之前）将gather与波次协调解耦。在波次边界——请求在不同时间在不同rank上完成，`_process_input_queue`阻塞等待下一个波次/新请求，`engines_running`粘性长达32步——一个rank可能到达gather，而另一个rank仍然阻塞在`_process_input_queue`或`future.result()`中。然后`all_gather`死锁；卡住的EngineCore无法再排空其worker共享内存广播通道，worker的`sample_tokens`响应无处可去，60秒后引擎因`RPC call to sample_tokens timed out`而死亡（间歇性观察到——\"5次GPQA运行正常，第6次挂起\"——因为触发条件取决于每次运行的完成时间）。这与专家并行是否跨越DP rank无关：故障机制是EngineCore↔worker shm耗尽，而不是worker前向传播。结论：**`balance_gather`必须紧跟在`super()._has_global_unfinished_reqs()`之后，这是唯一的每次迭代跨rank同步点，这样各rank在进入all-gather时刚刚就`engines_running`达成一致。** 因为`_has_global_unfinished_reqs`只在**没有**走空闲`continue`的迭代中被调用，所以当所有rank都空闲时，gather会被所有rank一致地跳过（没有rank执行额外的gather）——与重构前复制的`run_busy_loop`相同，其中gather紧跟在all-reduce之后。此教训由单元测试中的`_has_global_unfinished_reqs`接缝保护锁定。"
+
+msgid ""
+"**Timing — bit-for-bit identical to pre-refactor.** Gather now runs at the tail\n"
+"of `_has_global_unfinished_reqs`, i.e. after `schedule()` + execute +\n"
+"`update_from_output()` and immediately after the cross-rank all-reduce — exactly\n"
+"where the pre-refactor engine-core-driven gather sat. The gate consumes that\n"
+"value in the next step's `schedule()`; behavior is unchanged."
+msgstr ""
+"**时序——与重构前逐位一致。** Gather现在运行在`_has_global_unfinished_reqs`的尾部，即在`schedule()`"
+" + 执行 + `update_from_output()`之后，并紧跟在跨rank all-reduce之后——正是重构前由engine-"
+"core驱动的gather所在的位置。Gate在下一步的`schedule()`中消费该值；行为不变。"
+
+msgid "### Step 2 — Replace the `schedule()` copy with a minimal seam"
+msgstr "### 步骤2 — 用最小接缝替换`schedule()`副本"
+
+msgid ""
+"The `balance_flag` gate is inlined mid-`schedule()` by upstream; there is\n"
+"currently no overridable seam. This is solved in two phases."
+msgstr "`balance_flag` gate被上游内联在`schedule()`中间；目前没有可覆盖的接缝。这分两个阶段解决。"
+
+msgid "**Phase 2A — transitional (no upstream dependency):**"
+msgstr "**阶段2A — 过渡期（无上游依赖）：**"
+
+msgid "Keep the `schedule()` override, but:"
+msgstr "保留`schedule()`覆盖，但："
+
+msgid ""
+"- **The override signature takes the two-version union:**\n"
+"  `def schedule(self, throttle_prefills: bool = False)`. vllm-ascend CI runs\n"
+"  v0.23.0 (engine calls `schedule()`) and 1f486d96 (engine calls\n"
+"  `schedule(throttle_prefills)`) at the same time, so the override carries\n"
+"  `throttle_prefills` with a default and is callable by both engines. **The\n"
+"  disabled path delegates to `super()` via signature introspection** — compute\n"
+"  `_SUPER_SCHEDULE_HAS_THROTTLE` once at import; if true call\n"
+"  `super().schedule(throttle_prefills)`, else `super().schedule()`. This\n"
+"  replaces the old `vllm_version_is(\"0.23.0\")` version-string branch (which\n"
+"  `ValueError`s on a dev checkout and reframes \"does super accept the arg?\" as\n"
+"  \"does the version match?\").\n"
+"- Collapse the balance changes into 3 clearly-commented deltas: (1) the\n"
+"  disabled-path early return delegating to `super()`; (2) the `balance_flag`\n"
+"  gate inside the WAITING loop; (3) `if request_queue is None: break` (upstream\n"
+"  has `assert`). Because upstream has no finer-grained hook, the body still has\n"
+"  to be copied.\n"
+"- **Verbatim comparison is now reproducible:** the `schedule()` copy is aligned\n"
+"  to the release tag (only the 3 balance deltas differ), so the fixed tag makes\n"
+"  \"verbatim comparison against upstream\" yield the same baseline on every CI\n"
+"  run. The \"intent lock\" tests (signature callable by both engines, the 3 delta\n"
+"  lines present, upstream seams still exist) remain as CPU-reachable guardrails,\n"
+"  and a new \"verbatim comparison against the release tag (allowing only the 3\n"
+"  deltas)\" drift test is added (see Test plan). The drift test **reads the tag\n"
+"  at runtime from `.github/vllm-release-tag.commit`** (same source as CI) — it\n"
+"  does not hardcode a version or read a design doc; when the pin advances, the\n"
+"  test automatically compares against the new tag and goes red to signal \"the\n"
+"  copy needs re-syncing\".\n"
+"- \"Re-aligning the copy on a pin advance\" is now routine maintenance: each time\n"
+"  the release tag advances, re-apply the 3 deltas onto the new tag's\n"
+"  `schedule()` (continues until Phase 2B deletes the copy)."
+msgstr ""
+"- **重写签名采用双版本联合：**\n"
+"  `def schedule(self, throttle_prefills: bool = False)`。vllm-ascend CI 同时运行\n"
+"  v0.23.0（引擎调用 `schedule()`）和 1f486d96（引擎调用\n"
+"  `schedule(throttle_prefills)`），因此重写携带带有默认值的 `throttle_prefills`，两个引擎均可调用。**禁用路径通过签名内省委托给 `super()`** — 在导入时计算一次\n"
+"  `_SUPER_SCHEDULE_HAS_THROTTLE`；如果为真则调用\n"
+"  `super().schedule(throttle_prefills)`，否则调用 `super().schedule()`。这\n"
+"  取代了旧的 `vllm_version_is(\"0.23.0\")` 版本字符串分支（该分支在开发检出上会引发\n"
+"  `ValueError`，并将“父类是否接受该参数？”重新表述为“版本是否匹配？”）。\n"
+"- 将平衡变更压缩为3个带有清晰注释的差异点：(1) 禁用路径的早期返回委托给 `super()`；(2) WAITING 循环内的 `balance_flag` 门控；(3) `if request_queue is None: break`（上游使用 `assert`）。由于上游没有更细粒度的钩子，函数体仍需复制。\n"
+"- **逐字比较现在可重现：** `schedule()` 的副本与发布标签对齐（仅3个平衡差异点不同），因此固定的标签使得每次 CI 运行时“与上游的逐字比较”都能产生相同的基线。“意图锁定”测试（签名可被两个引擎调用，存在3个差异行，上游接缝仍然存在）继续作为 CPU 可及的护栏，并新增了一个“与发布标签的逐字比较（仅允许3个差异点）”的漂移测试（参见测试计划）。漂移测试**在运行时从 `.github/vllm-release-tag.commit` 读取标签**（与 CI 同源）——它不硬编码版本也不读取设计文档；当固定点前进时，测试自动与新标签比较并变红以指示“副本需要重新同步”。\n"
+"- “在固定点前进时重新对齐副本”现在是常规维护：每次发布标签前进时，将3个差异点重新应用到新标签的 `schedule()` 上（持续到阶段2B删除该副本）。"
+
+msgid "**Phase 2B — target (lands with an upstream contribution):**"
+msgstr "**阶段 2B — 目标（随上游贡献一起落地）：**"
+
+msgid ""
+"Contribute a minimal upstream refactor that extracts the WAITING loop's stop\n"
+"condition into an overridable method:"
+msgstr "贡献一个最小的上游重构，将 WAITING 循环的停止条件提取为一个可重写的方法："
+
+msgid "Once upstream exposes that seam, the Ascend patch collapses to:"
+msgstr "一旦上游暴露了该接缝，Ascend 补丁将简化为："
+
+msgid ""
+"(`>=` and `==` are equivalent here because no rank's `len(running)` can exceed\n"
+"`max_num_running_reqs`; the contract below pins the semantic to `==` to make\n"
+"\"leader-at-cap ⇒ freeze\" explicit and to reject the \"catch up to leader\"\n"
+"reinterpretation.)"
+msgstr ""
+"（此处 `>=` 和 `==` 等价，因为任何 rank 的 `len(running)` 都不会超过 "
+"`max_num_running_reqs`；下面的契约将语义固定为 `==`，以明确“领导者达到上限 ⇒ 冻结”，并拒绝“追赶领导者”的重新解释。）"
+
+msgid ""
+"**Result:** the ~520-line `schedule()` copy is deleted for good; the file no\n"
+"longer drifts with upstream edits to `schedule()`. This is the \"long-term plan\n"
+"to contribute upstream\" that `AGENTS.md` requires."
+msgstr ""
+"**结果：** 约520行的 `schedule()` 副本被永久删除；该文件不再因上游对 `schedule()` 的编辑而产生漂移。这是 "
+"`AGENTS.md` 所要求的“向上游贡献的长期计划”。"
+
+msgid ""
+"> **On `>=` vs `==`, and the rejected \"temporarily lower the cap\" idea.** An\n"
+"> earlier idea was to reuse upstream's existing break condition for zero-copy by\n"
+"> temporarily setting\n"
+"> `self.max_num_running_reqs = min(cap, max(balance_queue))`. That would produce\n"
+"> a **different** semantic (\"make lagging ranks catch up to the leader\") and is\n"
+"> **explicitly rejected** — see the contract below."
+msgstr ""
+"> **关于 `>=` 与 `==`，以及被拒绝的“临时降低上限”想法。** 一个早期的想法是通过临时设置 "
+"`self.max_num_running_reqs = min(cap, max(balance_queue))` "
+"来重用上游现有的零拷贝中断条件。这将产生一个**不同**的语义（“让落后的 rank 追赶领导者”），并且被**明确拒绝**——请参见下面的契约。"
+
+msgid "### Step 3 — Normalize config probing"
+msgstr "### 步骤 3 — 规范化配置探测"
+
+msgid ""
+"`_balance_scheduling_enabled()` collapses to **two fallbacks (AscendConfig →\n"
+"additional_config)**. After deleting the `run_engine_core` copy, the only caller\n"
+"is `BalanceScheduler.__init__`, but whether AscendConfig is initialized at that\n"
+"moment still cannot be guaranteed (the origin of the old top-of-file TODO), so\n"
+"`additional_config` is kept as a startup-window fallback and the function\n"
+"returns `False` otherwise. This round tightens one thing relative to the old\n"
+"implementation:"
+msgstr ""
+"`_balance_scheduling_enabled()` 简化为**两个回退选项（AscendConfig → "
+"additional_config）**。删除 `run_engine_core` 副本后，唯一的调用者是 "
+"`BalanceScheduler.__init__`，但此时 AscendConfig 是否已初始化仍无法保证（这是旧文件顶部 TODO "
+"的起源），因此保留 `additional_config` 作为启动窗口期的回退，否则函数返回 `False`。本轮相对于旧实现收紧了一件事："
+
+msgid ""
+"- **The direct environment-variable read is removed.** The old implementation\n"
+"  fell back to a bare `os.getenv(\"VLLM_ASCEND_BALANCE_SCHEDULING\")`, violating\n"
+"  AGENTS.md's \"no scattered `os.getenv`\". This function no longer reads the\n"
+"  environment itself — `VLLM_ASCEND_BALANCE_SCHEDULING` is parsed centrally by\n"
+"  `AscendConfig` (as a deprecated fallback for `additional_config`) and takes\n"
+"  effect via the main `get_ascend_config().enable_balance_scheduling` path,\n"
+"  avoiding multiple entry points.\n"
+"- The top-of-file TODO is updated to \"once AscendConfig initialization is moved\n"
+"  earlier, this can collapse to a single\n"
+"  `get_ascend_config().enable_balance_scheduling` read\"."
+msgstr ""
+"- **移除了直接的环境变量读取。** 旧实现回退到裸的 `os.getenv(\"VLLM_ASCEND_BALANCE_SCHEDULING\")`，违反了 AGENTS.md 的“无散落 `os.getenv`”原则。此函数不再自行读取环境变量——`VLLM_ASCEND_BALANCE_SCHEDULING` 由 `AscendConfig` 集中解析（作为 `additional_config` 的已弃用回退），并通过主路径 `get_ascend_config().enable_balance_scheduling` 生效，避免了多个入口点。\n"
+"- 文件顶部的 TODO 更新为“一旦 AscendConfig 初始化被提前，这可以简化为单个 `get_ascend_config().enable_balance_scheduling` 读取”。"
+
+msgid ""
+"> Later (once AscendConfig timing is settled): collapse the two fallbacks into a\n"
+"> single read."
+msgstr "> 稍后（一旦 AscendConfig 的时机问题解决）：将两个回退合并为单个读取。"
+
+msgid "## Behavior-preservation contract"
+msgstr "## 行为保持契约"
+
+msgid ""
+"This refactor **must** strictly preserve the following invariants; any\n"
+"deviation is a bug."
+msgstr "此重构**必须**严格保持以下不变性；任何偏离都是错误。"
+
+msgid ""
+"1. **Leader-at-cap ⇒ global freeze.** `balance_flag` is\n"
+"   `max(balance_queue) == max_num_running_reqs`, computed on every rank from the\n"
+"   previous step's gathered `len(running)`. When true, no rank admits a new\n"
+"   WAITING request. The comparison is `==` against the configured\n"
+"   `max_num_running_reqs` — **not** `>=`, **not** \"catch up to leader\".\n"
+"2. **Same inputs ⇒ same outputs.** Given the same `self.running`, `self.waiting`,\n"
+"   `self.skipped_waiting`, `balance_queue`, and token budget, the refactored\n"
+"   `schedule()` produces a `SchedulerOutput` identical to the current\n"
+"   implementation (same scheduled / preempted / resumed sets, same\n"
+"   `num_scheduled_tokens`, same connector metadata).\n"
+"3. **Gather cadence unchanged.** Exactly one `all_gather` per active engine step,\n"
+"   on the same DP group, payload still `len(self.running)`, skipped consistently\n"
+"   by all ranks when all are idle. Only the call site moved.\n"
+"4. **Disabled path unchanged.** When `enable_balance_scheduling` is false,\n"
+"   `_balance_run_engine_core` restores the module-level `DPEngineCoreProc` to\n"
+"   the upstream original and the engine core runs upstream's implementation\n"
+"   verbatim; `BalanceScheduler` with `_balance_enabled=False` delegates\n"
+"   `schedule()` to `super().schedule()`, does not allocate `balance_queue`, and\n"
+"   performs no collective communication. I.e. balance does not touch any config\n"
+"   when off (including PD-disaggregated recompute / `AsyncRecomputeScheduler`,\n"
+"   which is already mutually exclusive with balance via `platform.py`; this is a\n"
+"   second layer of defense).\n"
+"5. **Existing constraints still apply.** The `profiling_chunk_config` mutex (see\n"
+"   `vllm_ascend/ascend_config.py`) and the PD-mixed-mode restriction (see\n"
+"   `vllm_ascend/platform.py`) are still enforced where they were."
+msgstr ""
+"1. **领导者达到容量上限 ⇒ 全局冻结。** `balance_flag` 为\n"
+"   `max(balance_queue) == max_num_running_reqs`，根据上一步收集到的各 rank 的 `len(running)` 计算。当条件为真时，所有 rank 都不再接受新的 WAITING 请求。比较操作是 `==` 与配置的 `max_num_running_reqs` 进行比较——**不是** `>=`，**也不是**“追赶领导者”。\n"
+"2. **相同输入 ⇒ 相同输出。** 给定相同的 `self.running`、`self.waiting`、`self.skipped_waiting`、`balance_queue` 和 token 预算，重构后的 `schedule()` 产生的 `SchedulerOutput` 与当前实现完全相同（相同的已调度/已抢占/已恢复集合，相同的 `num_scheduled_tokens`，相同的连接器元数据）。\n"
+"3. **收集节奏不变。** 每个活跃引擎步骤恰好执行一次 `all_gather`，在相同的 DP 组上，负载仍然是 `len(self.running)`，当所有 rank 都空闲时，所有 rank 一致地跳过。仅调用位置发生了变化。\n"
+"4. **禁用路径不变。** 当 `enable_balance_scheduling` 为 false 时，`_balance_run_engine_core` 将模块级别的 `DPEngineCoreProc` 恢复为上游原始实现，并且引擎核心逐字运行上游的实现；`BalanceScheduler` 在 `_balance_enabled=False` 时将 `schedule()` 委托给 `super().schedule()`，不分配 `balance_queue`，并且不执行任何集合通信。即，当平衡功能关闭时，它不会触及任何配置（包括 PD 分离重计算 / `AsyncRecomputeScheduler`，后者已通过 `platform.py` 与平衡功能互斥；这是第二层防御）。\n"
+"5. **现有约束仍然适用。** `profiling_chunk_config` 互斥锁（参见 `vllm_ascend/ascend_config.py`）和 PD 混合模式限制（参见 `vllm_ascend/platform.py`）仍在原处强制执行。"
+
+msgid "## Post-refactor file shape"
+msgstr "## 重构后的文件结构"
+
+msgid ""
+"After this round (Phase 1 + 2A + 3), the key structure is as follows. The\n"
+"`schedule()` body is a verbatim copy of release tag `v0.23.0` (cannot be\n"
+"deleted before Phase 2B), with three documented deltas (disabled-path early\n"
+"return + the `balance_flag` gate in the WAITING loop + `if request_queue is\n"
+"None: break`):"
+msgstr ""
+"经过本轮（阶段 1 + 2A + 3）后，关键结构如下。`schedule()` 主体是发布标签 `v0.23.0` 的逐字副本（在阶段 2B "
+"之前不能删除），包含三个已记录的差异（禁用路径的提前返回 + WAITING 循环中的 `balance_flag` 门控 + `if "
+"request_queue is None: break`）："
+
+msgid ""
+"This round deleted the ~95-line `run_engine_core` + `run_busy_loop` copies and\n"
+"their dead imports, and added the module docstring, comments, and the\n"
+"`_balance_run_engine_core` conditional-activation wrapper; the net line count\n"
+"barely dropped, but **what it removes is stale-drift risk** (the old copies had\n"
+"fallen behind upstream's `_handle_shutdown` / `eep_scaling_state` /\n"
+"`SignalCallback` evolution) and it fixes the balance-enabled deadlock (gather\n"
+"first inside `schedule()`, then inside `_process_engine_step`; now after\n"
+"`_has_global_unfinished_reqs`)."
+msgstr ""
+"本轮删除了约 95 行的 `run_engine_core` + `run_busy_loop` 副本及其无效导入，并添加了模块文档字符串、注释和 "
+"`_balance_run_engine_core` 条件激活包装器；净行数几乎没有减少，但**它消除的是陈旧漂移风险**（旧副本已落后于上游的 "
+"`_handle_shutdown` / `eep_scaling_state` / `SignalCallback` "
+"演进），并修复了启用平衡时的死锁（先在 `schedule()` 内部收集，然后在 `_process_engine_step` 内部收集；现在在 "
+"`_has_global_unfinished_reqs` 之后）。"
+
+msgid ""
+"> Phase 2B (upstream provides `_should_stop_admitting_waiting`) is what deletes\n"
+"> the ~520-line `schedule()` copy and shrinks the file to roughly **60–80 lines\n"
+"> with zero verbatim upstream copy**."
+msgstr ""
+"> 阶段 2B（上游提供 `_should_stop_admitting_waiting`）将删除约 520 行的 `schedule()` "
+"副本，并将文件缩减至大约 **60–80 行，且不包含任何逐字上游副本**。"
+
+msgid "## Test plan"
+msgstr "## 测试计划"
+
+msgid ""
+"1. **Signature + intent lock + verbatim drift test (Phase 2A).** Assert: (a)\n"
+"   `BalanceScheduler.schedule`'s signature is **bindable by both engine call\n"
+"   shapes** (`schedule()` and `schedule(throttle_prefills=...)`) **and is a\n"
+"   superset of the installed `Scheduler.schedule` parameter set** — note this is\n"
+"   NOT \"signature line equals installed\", because under dual-version CI the two\n"
+"   lanes' installed signatures differ and an equality assertion can only pass on\n"
+"   one lane (this locks the \"dual versions ⇒ take the union\" lesson); (b) the 3\n"
+"   balance delta lines must exist in the body (disabled-path `super().schedule()`\n"
+"   delegation, the `balance_flag` gate in the WAITING loop,\n"
+"   `if request_queue is None: break`); (c) the `_balance_run_engine_core`\n"
+"   wrapper is installed and `DPEngineCoreProc` is **not** swapped at import\n"
+"   (deferred to the wrapper, swapped conditionally on call); (d) upstream\n"
+"   `DPEngineCoreProc._has_global_unfinished_reqs` still exists (the gather\n"
+"   injection point — it MUST be called every non-idle iteration or the\n"
+"   all_gather deadlocks); (e) upstream `Scheduler` seam methods (including\n"
+"   `_build_kv_connector_meta`, `_inflight_prefill_reserved_blocks`) still exist;\n"
+"   (f) **verbatim drift detection** — first read the release tag from\n"
+"   `.github/vllm-release-tag.commit` (same source as CI, **not hardcoded, not\n"
+"   read from a design doc**), then `git show <tag>:vllm/v1/core/sched/scheduler.py`\n"
+"   to fetch that tag's `schedule()`, strip the same 3 deltas, and AST-compare it\n"
+"   verbatim against `BalanceScheduler.schedule`'s source; the two must be\n"
+"   identical. Reading the pin file means a pin advance **automatically** flips\n"
+"   the test to compare against the new tag and go red, signaling \"the copy needs\n"
+"   re-syncing\" — exactly the maintenance signal we want; if the pin file or tag\n"
+"   is unreachable (e.g. vLLM not a source checkout, running outside the\n"
+"   vllm-ascend tree), the test is skipped, not failed.\n"
+"2. **Behavior-equivalence test.** Build a `BalanceScheduler` with a fake DP\n"
+"   group and a hand-set `balance_queue`, drive `schedule()` under several\n"
+"   representative states (leader-at-cap freeze, lagging rank not full, disabled,\n"
+"   empty waiting), and assert the `SchedulerOutput` is identical (contract item\n"
+"   2). Reuse the balance test scaffolding in `tests/ut/test_platform.py`.\n"
+"3. **Gather cadence test.** Mock `torch.distributed.all_gather` (note: inside\n"
+"   `balance_gather`, `dist = torch.distributed`, so the mock target must be\n"
+"   `torch.distributed.all_gather`, not `vllm.distributed.all_gather`); assert\n"
+"   that each `balance_gather()` does exactly one `all_gather`, with payload\n"
+"   `len(self.running)` and the injected dp_group (contract item 3).\n"
+"4. **Disabled-path test.** With the flag off, assert `balance_queue` is not\n"
+"   allocated, `all_gather` is not called, and `schedule()` delegates to\n"
+"   `super().schedule()` (contract item 4).\n"
+"5. **NPU performance check.** Per AGENTS.md's NPU guidance,\n"
+"   `max(t.item() for t in self.balance_queue)` triggers one host sync per step\n"
+"   (unavoidable, since this value drives host-side control flow). Profile to\n"
+"   confirm the refactor introduces **no** extra sync beyond the current one."
+msgstr ""
+
+msgid "## Phased rollout"
+msgstr ""
+
+msgid ""
+"| Phase | Scope"
+"                                                                                                                  "
+"| Risk | Depends on     | Status        |"
+msgstr ""
+
+msgid ""
+"| 2A    | Override signature takes the **two-version union** "
+"(`schedule(self, throttle_prefills=False)`, CI runs v0.23.0 + 1f486d96 at "
+"once); **body aligned verbatim to the release tag** (only the 3 balance "
+"deltas); disabled path delegates to `super()` via **signature "
+"introspection** (`_SUPER_SCHEDULE_HAS_THROTTLE`); signature-callability + "
+"intent-lock + release-tag verbatim drift tests | Low  | none           | ✅ "
+"Done       |"
+msgstr ""
+
+msgid ""
+"| 2B    | Upstream `_should_stop_admitting_waiting` PR; delete the "
+"`schedule()` copy                                            | Med  | "
+"upstream review | ⏳ TODO      |"
+msgstr ""
+
+msgid ""
+"| Tests | Drift regression / behavior equivalence / gather cadence / "
+"disabled path / NPU performance check                      | Low  | Phase 1 "
+"+ 2A   | ⏳ TODO (needs NPU) |"
+msgstr ""
+
+msgid ""
+"Each phase can be released and rolled back independently. Phases 1, 2A, and 3\n"
+"can land in the same release; 2B lands when the upstream PR merges."
+msgstr ""

@@ -0,0 +1,509 @@
+# SOME DESCRIPTIVE TITLE.
+# Copyright (C) 2026, vllm-ascend team
+# This file is distributed under the same license as the vllm-ascend package.
+# FIRST AUTHOR <EMAIL@ADDRESS>, 2026.
+#
+msgid ""
+msgstr ""
+"Project-Id-Version: vllm-ascend\n"
+"Report-Msgid-Bugs-To: \n"
+"POT-Creation-Date: 2026-07-10 04:12+0000\n"
+"PO-Revision-Date: 2026-07-10 04:12+0000\n"
+"Last-Translator: \n"
+"Language-Team: zh_CN <LL@li.org>\n"
+"Language: zh_CN\n"
+"MIME-Version: 1.0\n"
+"Content-Type: text/plain; charset=utf-8\n"
+"Content-Transfer-Encoding: 8bit\n"
+"Plural-Forms: nplurals=1; plural=0;\n"
+"Generated-By: detect_po_changes.py\n"
+
+msgid "# Gemma4 Deployment Tutorial"
+msgstr "# Gemma4 部署教程"
+
+msgid "## 1 Introduction"
+msgstr "## 1 引言"
+
+msgid ""
+"Gemma4 is a Gemma-family language model that includes dense and Mixture-of-"
+"Experts (MoE) variants, and is suitable for general text generation, "
+"reasoning, and instruction-following scenarios."
+msgstr "Gemma4 是 Gemma 系列语言模型，包含密集型和混合专家（MoE）变体，适用于通用文本生成、推理和指令遵循场景。"
+
+msgid ""
+"This document describes the main validation steps for Gemma4 on Atlas A2, "
+"Atlas A3, and Ascend 950 Products, including supported features, "
+"prerequisites, installation, single-node online deployment, functional "
+"verification, offline inference, accuracy and performance evaluation, "
+"performance tuning, and FAQs."
+msgstr ""
+"本文档描述了在 Atlas A2、Atlas A3 和 Ascend 950 产品上对 Gemma4 "
+"进行的主要验证步骤，包括支持特性、前提条件、安装、单节点在线部署、功能验证、离线推理、精度与性能评估、性能调优以及常见问题解答。"
+
+msgid ""
+"This document is written based on the latest vLLM Ascend main branch. Gemma4"
+" is supported on Atlas A2, Atlas A3, and Ascend 950 Products in this "
+"version."
+msgstr ""
+"本文档基于最新的 vLLM Ascend 主分支编写。在此版本中，Gemma4 在 Atlas A2、Atlas A3 和 Ascend 950 "
+"产品上受支持。"
+
+msgid "## 2 Supported Features"
+msgstr "## 2 支持特性"
+
+msgid ""
+"Refer to [supported "
+"models](../../user_guide/support_matrix/supported_models.md) to get the "
+"model support matrix, including BF16, chunked prefill, automatic prefix "
+"caching, tensor parallelism, expert parallelism, and ACLGraph support."
+msgstr ""
+"请参考[支持的模型](../../user_guide/support_matrix/supported_models.md)获取模型支持矩阵，包括 "
+"BF16、分块预填充、自动前缀缓存、张量并行、专家并行和 ACLGraph 支持。"
+
+msgid ""
+"Refer to [feature guide](../../user_guide/feature_guide/index.md) to get "
+"feature configuration details."
+msgstr "请参考[特性指南](../../user_guide/feature_guide/index.md)获取特性配置详情。"
+
+msgid ""
+"Gemma4 supports both eager execution and ACLGraph execution on Atlas A2, "
+"Atlas A3, and Ascend 950 Products. For graph execution, `FULL_DECODE_ONLY` "
+"can reduce decode-phase dispatch overhead, while `PIECEWISE` is also "
+"supported."
+msgstr ""
+"Gemma4 在 Atlas A2、Atlas A3 和 Ascend 950 产品上同时支持 eager 执行和 ACLGraph "
+"执行。对于图执行，`FULL_DECODE_ONLY` 可以减少解码阶段的调度开销，同时也支持 `PIECEWISE`。"
+
+msgid "## 3 Prerequisites"
+msgstr "## 3 前提条件"
+
+msgid "### 3.1 Model Weight"
+msgstr "### 3.1 模型权重"
+
+msgid ""
+"Download the Gemma4 model weight to a local or shared directory, such as "
+"`/root/.cache/`. In the following examples, replace "
+"`/root/.cache/path/to/gemma4` with your actual model path."
+msgstr ""
+"将 Gemma4 模型权重下载到本地或共享目录，例如 `/root/.cache/`。在以下示例中，请将 "
+"`/root/.cache/path/to/gemma4` 替换为您的实际模型路径。"
+
+msgid "| Model type | Description | Recommended hardware |"
+msgstr "| 模型类型 | 描述 | 推荐硬件 |"
+
+msgid ""
+"| Gemma4 dense model | Dense Gemma4 weight. | A single Atlas A2, Atlas A3, "
+"or Ascend 950 node. Adjust the number of visible NPUs according to model "
+"size. |"
+msgstr ""
+"| Gemma4 密集型模型 | 密集型 Gemma4 权重。 | 单个 Atlas A2、Atlas A3 或 Ascend 950 "
+"节点。根据模型大小调整可见 NPU 数量。 |"
+
+msgid ""
+"| Gemma4 MoE model | Mixture-of-Experts Gemma4 weight. | A single Atlas A2, "
+"Atlas A3, or Ascend 950 node. Use tensor parallelism or expert parallelism "
+"according to the model size and deployment plan. |"
+msgstr ""
+"| Gemma4 MoE 模型 | 混合专家 Gemma4 权重。 | 单个 Atlas A2、Atlas A3 或 Ascend 950 "
+"节点。根据模型大小和部署计划使用张量并行或专家并行。 |"
+
+msgid ""
+"The examples below assume a single node with visible NPUs. The commands use "
+"4 visible NPUs as an example. Adjust `ASCEND_RT_VISIBLE_DEVICES` and "
+"`--tensor-parallel-size` according to the model size and available devices."
+msgstr ""
+"以下示例假设为单节点且 NPU 可见。命令以使用 4 个可见 NPU 为例。请根据模型大小和可用设备调整 "
+"`ASCEND_RT_VISIBLE_DEVICES` 和 `--tensor-parallel-size`。"
+
+msgid "### 3.2 Verify Multi-node Communication (Optional)"
+msgstr "### 3.2 验证多节点通信（可选）"
+
+msgid ""
+"If multi-node deployment is required, verify the multi-node communication "
+"environment according to [Verify Multi-node Communication "
+"Environment](../../installation.md#verify-multi-node-communication)."
+msgstr ""
+"如果需要多节点部署，请按照[验证多节点通信环境](../../installation.md#verify-multi-node-"
+"communication)验证多节点通信环境。"
+
+msgid "## 4 Installation"
+msgstr "## 4 安装"
+
+msgid "### 4.1 Image Availability"
+msgstr "### 4.1 镜像可用性"
+
+msgid ""
+"If you need a prebuilt image, contact Huawei engineers to obtain the "
+"appropriate image and software stack for your target hardware."
+msgstr "如果您需要预构建镜像，请联系华为工程师获取适用于您目标硬件的镜像和软件栈。"
+
+msgid ""
+"After the environment is prepared, verify that the NPU devices are visible:"
+msgstr "环境准备就绪后，验证 NPU 设备是否可见："
+
+msgid "Expected result: `npu-smi info` lists the expected Ascend devices."
+msgstr "预期结果：`npu-smi info` 列出预期的 Ascend 设备。"
+
+msgid "### 4.2 Source Code Installation"
+msgstr "### 4.2 源码安装"
+
+msgid "Install vLLM Ascend from the main branch:"
+msgstr "从主分支安装 vLLM Ascend："
+
+msgid "To verify the source installation, run the following command:"
+msgstr "要验证源码安装，请运行以下命令："
+
+msgid ""
+"Expected result: the command prints the installed vLLM Ascend version "
+"without errors."
+msgstr "预期结果：命令打印已安装的 vLLM Ascend 版本且无错误。"
+
+msgid "## 5 Online Service Deployment"
+msgstr "## 5 在线服务部署"
+
+msgid "### 5.1 Single-Node Online Deployment"
+msgstr "### 5.1 单节点在线部署"
+
+msgid ""
+"Single-node deployment runs both Prefill and Decode on the same node, and is"
+" suitable for functional verification and single-node serving. The following"
+" examples show eager and ACLGraph startup commands. The commands use 4 "
+"visible NPUs as an example. Adjust `ASCEND_RT_VISIBLE_DEVICES` and "
+"`--tensor-parallel-size` when using a different device count."
+msgstr ""
+"单节点部署在同一节点上运行 Prefill 和 Decode，适用于功能验证和单节点服务。以下示例展示了 eager 和 ACLGraph "
+"启动命令。命令以使用 4 个可见 NPU 为例。当使用不同设备数量时，请调整 `ASCEND_RT_VISIBLE_DEVICES` 和 "
+"`--tensor-parallel-size`。"
+
+msgid ""
+"> **Note**: In this tutorial, `/root/.cache/path/to/gemma4` is a "
+"placeholder. Replace it with your actual Gemma4 model path."
+msgstr ""
+"> **注意**：在本教程中，`/root/.cache/path/to/gemma4` 是一个占位符。请将其替换为您的实际 Gemma4 模型路径。"
+
+msgid "#### Eager Mode"
+msgstr "#### Eager 模式"
+
+msgid ""
+"Use eager mode as the baseline configuration for functional verification."
+msgstr "使用 eager 模式作为功能验证的基线配置。"
+
+msgid "#### ACLGraph Mode"
+msgstr "#### ACLGraph 模式"
+
+msgid ""
+"Use ACLGraph mode when graph execution is required. `FULL_DECODE_ONLY` can "
+"reduce decode-phase dispatch overhead."
+msgstr "当需要图执行时使用 ACLGraph 模式。`FULL_DECODE_ONLY` 可以减少解码阶段的调度开销。"
+
+msgid ""
+"Common Issues Tip: If the service fails to start, HBM is insufficient, or "
+"requests are not scheduled as expected, refer to [FAQs](../../faqs.md) "
+"first, and then check the model-specific FAQ in Section 10."
+msgstr ""
+"常见问题提示：如果服务启动失败、HBM 不足或请求未按预期调度，请先参考[常见问题解答](../../faqs.md)，然后查看第 10 "
+"节中的模型特定常见问题解答。"
+
+msgid "#### Key Parameters"
+msgstr "#### 关键参数"
+
+msgid ""
+"- `--tensor-parallel-size`: sets the tensor parallel size. Adjust it according to model size and available NPU devices.\n"
+"- `--enable-expert-parallel`: enables expert parallelism for MoE variants when the deployment plan uses EP.\n"
+"- `--max-model-len`: sets the maximum input plus output length for a single request. Increase it only when enough KV cache is available.\n"
+"- `--enforce-eager`: enables eager execution for baseline verification.\n"
+"- `--compilation-config`: configures graph execution. `FULL_DECODE_ONLY` can reduce decode-phase dispatch overhead, and `PIECEWISE` is also supported.\n"
+"- `--trust-remote-code`: allows vLLM to load model-specific code when required by the model repository."
+msgstr ""
+"- `--tensor-parallel-size`：设置张量并行大小。根据模型大小和可用 NPU 设备进行调整。\n"
+"- `--enable-expert-parallel`：当部署计划使用 EP 时，为 MoE 变体启用专家并行。\n"
+"- `--max-model-len`：设置单个请求的最大输入加输出长度。仅在 KV 缓存充足时增加。\n"
+"- `--enforce-eager`：启用 eager 执行以进行基线验证。\n"
+"- `--compilation-config`：配置图执行。`FULL_DECODE_ONLY` 可以减少解码阶段的调度开销，同时也支持 `PIECEWISE`。\n"
+"- `--trust-remote-code`：当模型仓库需要时，允许 vLLM 加载模型特定代码。"
+
+msgid "#### Service Verification"
+msgstr "#### 服务验证"
+
+msgid ""
+"After the service is started, send a request to verify basic model "
+"functionality."
+msgstr "服务启动后，发送请求以验证基本模型功能。"
+
+msgid ""
+"Expected result: the HTTP status is 200 and the JSON response contains a "
+"`choices` field with generated text."
+msgstr "预期结果：HTTP 状态码为 200，JSON 响应包含带有生成文本的 `choices` 字段。"
+
+msgid "### 5.2 Multi-Card Deployment"
+msgstr "### 5.2 多卡部署"
+
+msgid ""
+"This tutorial provides single-node multi-card deployment examples for Gemma4"
+" on Atlas A2, Atlas A3, and Ascend 950 Products. For different model sizes "
+"or device counts, adjust `ASCEND_RT_VISIBLE_DEVICES` and `--tensor-parallel-"
+"size` according to the available NPUs."
+msgstr ""
+"本教程提供了在 Atlas A2、Atlas A3 和 Ascend 950 产品上针对 Gemma4 "
+"的单节点多卡部署示例。对于不同的模型大小或设备数量，请根据可用 NPU 调整 `ASCEND_RT_VISIBLE_DEVICES` 和 "
+"`--tensor-parallel-size`。"
+
+msgid "## 6 Functional Verification"
+msgstr "## 6 功能验证"
+
+msgid ""
+"After the service is started, Gemma4 can be invoked through OpenAI-"
+"compatible APIs."
+msgstr "服务启动后，可通过兼容OpenAI的API调用Gemma4。"
+
+msgid "### 6.1 Completions API"
+msgstr "### 6.1 补全API"
+
+msgid "### 6.2 Chat Completions API"
+msgstr "### 6.2 聊天补全API"
+
+msgid ""
+"Expected result: the request returns HTTP 200, and the JSON response "
+"contains a `choices` field with generated text from the model."
+msgstr "预期结果：请求返回HTTP 200，JSON响应中包含`choices`字段，其中包含模型生成的文本。"
+
+msgid "### 6.3 Offline Inference"
+msgstr "### 6.3 离线推理"
+
+msgid "## 7 Accuracy Evaluation"
+msgstr "## 7 精度评估"
+
+msgid ""
+"> **Note**: Post-processing parameters, such as `max_tokens`, `temperature`,"
+" and stop tokens, should match those defined in the model weight's "
+"`generation_config.json`."
+msgstr ""
+"> "
+"**注意**：后处理参数（如`max_tokens`、`temperature`和停止词）应与模型权重的`generation_config.json`中定义的参数一致。"
+
+msgid "### 7.1 Using AISBench"
+msgstr "### 7.1 使用AISBench"
+
+msgid ""
+"Refer to [Using "
+"AISBench](../../developer_guide/evaluation/using_ais_bench.md) for details."
+msgstr ""
+"详情请参考[使用AISBench](../../developer_guide/evaluation/using_ais_bench.md)。"
+
+msgid "### 7.2 Using Language Model Evaluation Harness"
+msgstr "### 7.2 使用语言模型评估工具"
+
+msgid ""
+"Using the GPQA-Diamond dataset as an example, run the accuracy evaluation "
+"for the selected Gemma4 dense or MoE model in online mode. Refer to [Using "
+"lm_eval](../../developer_guide/evaluation/using_lm_eval.md) for installation"
+" and usage details."
+msgstr ""
+"以GPQA-"
+"Diamond数据集为例，在在线模式下对所选Gemma4稠密或MoE模型运行精度评估。安装和使用详情请参考[使用lm_eval](../../developer_guide/evaluation/using_lm_eval.md)。"
+
+msgid "## 8 Performance Evaluation"
+msgstr "## 8 性能评估"
+
+msgid "### 8.1 Using AISBench"
+msgstr "### 8.1 使用AISBench"
+
+msgid ""
+"Refer to [Using AISBench for performance "
+"evaluation](../../developer_guide/evaluation/using_ais_bench.md#execute-"
+"performance-evaluation) for details."
+msgstr ""
+"详情请参考[使用AISBench进行性能评估](../../developer_guide/evaluation/using_ais_bench.md#execute-"
+"performance-evaluation)。"
+
+msgid "### 8.2 Using vLLM Benchmark"
+msgstr "### 8.2 使用vLLM基准测试"
+
+msgid ""
+"Refer to [vLLM benchmark](https://docs.vllm.ai/en/latest/benchmarking/) for "
+"details."
+msgstr "详情请参考[vLLM基准测试](https://docs.vllm.ai/en/latest/benchmarking/)。"
+
+msgid "## 9 Performance Tuning"
+msgstr "## 9 性能调优"
+
+msgid "### 9.1 Recommended Configurations"
+msgstr "### 9.1 推荐配置"
+
+msgid ""
+"The following configurations are for reference only. The optimal "
+"configuration depends on hardware resources, model size, maximum "
+"input/output length, request concurrency, prefix cache hit rate, and whether"
+" the selected Gemma4 weight is dense or MoE. Tune the parameters in Section "
+"9.2 based on your actual workload."
+msgstr ""
+"以下配置仅供参考。最佳配置取决于硬件资源、模型大小、最大输入/输出长度、请求并发数、前缀缓存命中率以及所选Gemma4权重是稠密还是MoE。请根据实际工作负载调整第9.2节中的参数。"
+
+msgid ""
+"| Scenario | Deployment Mode | Total NPUs | Model Type | Key Considerations "
+"|"
+msgstr "| 场景 | 部署模式 | NPU总数 | 模型类型 | 关键考虑因素 |"
+
+msgid ""
+"| Functional verification | Single-node online serving | 4 | Dense or MoE | "
+"Use eager mode first to verify model loading and basic generation. |"
+msgstr "| 功能验证 | 单节点在线服务 | 4 | 稠密或MoE | 首先使用eager模式验证模型加载和基础生成。 |"
+
+msgid ""
+"| Generation serving | Single-node online serving | 4 | Dense or MoE | Use "
+"ACLGraph with `FULL_DECODE_ONLY` to reduce decode dispatch overhead. |"
+msgstr ""
+"| 生成服务 | 单节点在线服务 | 4 | 稠密或MoE | 使用带有`FULL_DECODE_ONLY`的ACLGraph以减少解码调度开销。 |"
+
+msgid ""
+"| Long context | Single-node online serving | 4 | Dense or MoE | Increase "
+"`--max-model-len` only when enough KV cache is available; lower concurrency "
+"if OOM occurs. |"
+msgstr ""
+"| 长上下文 | 单节点在线服务 | 4 | 稠密或MoE | 仅在KV缓存充足时增加`--max-model-len`；若发生OOM则降低并发数。 |"
+
+msgid ""
+"| MoE serving | Single-node online serving | 4 | MoE | Use tensor "
+"parallelism or expert parallelism according to model size and deployment "
+"plan. |"
+msgstr "| MoE服务 | 单节点在线服务 | 4 | MoE | 根据模型大小和部署计划使用张量并行或专家并行。 |"
+
+msgid "### 9.2 Tuning Guidelines"
+msgstr "### 9.2 调优指南"
+
+msgid ""
+"Please refer to [Public Performance Tuning "
+"Documentation](../../developer_guide/performance_and_debug/optimization_and_tuning.md)"
+" for general tuning methods."
+msgstr ""
+"通用调优方法请参考[公开性能调优文档](../../developer_guide/performance_and_debug/optimization_and_tuning.md)。"
+
+msgid ""
+"Please refer to [Feature "
+"Guide](../../user_guide/support_matrix/feature_matrix.md) for detailed "
+"feature descriptions."
+msgstr "详细功能描述请参考[功能指南](../../user_guide/support_matrix/feature_matrix.md)。"
+
+msgid "Recommended tuning order:"
+msgstr "推荐调优顺序："
+
+msgid ""
+"1. Use eager mode to verify model loading and generation correctness.\n"
+"2. Enable ACLGraph with `FULL_DECODE_ONLY` for generation serving and compare it with the eager baseline.\n"
+"3. Choose `--max-model-len` according to the required context length. Long context increases KV cache usage, so reduce `--max-num-seqs` if OOM occurs.\n"
+"4. Tune `--max-num-batched-tokens`. Larger values can improve prefill efficiency but consume more activation memory.\n"
+"5. Tune `--max-num-seqs` according to service concurrency. Requests above this value wait in the queue.\n"
+"6. Tune `--gpu-memory-utilization` when more KV cache is needed, while leaving enough HBM headroom for runtime memory fluctuation.\n"
+"7. For MoE variants, choose tensor parallelism or expert parallelism according to the model size and deployment plan, and compare throughput and latency under the same request workload."
+msgstr ""
+"1. 使用eager模式验证模型加载和生成的正确性。\n"
+"2. 启用带有`FULL_DECODE_ONLY`的ACLGraph用于生成服务，并与eager基线进行比较。\n"
+"3. 根据所需的上下文长度选择`--max-model-len`。长上下文会增加KV缓存使用量，若发生OOM则减少`--max-num-seqs`。\n"
+"4. 调整`--max-num-batched-tokens`。较大的值可以提高预填充效率，但会消耗更多激活内存。\n"
+"5. 根据服务并发数调整`--max-num-seqs`。超过此值的请求将在队列中等待。\n"
+"6. 当需要更多KV缓存时调整`--gpu-memory-utilization`，同时为运行时内存波动保留足够的HBM余量。\n"
+"7. 对于MoE变体，根据模型大小和部署计划选择张量并行或专家并行，并在相同请求负载下比较吞吐量和延迟。"
+
+msgid "### 9.3 Model-Specific Optimizations"
+msgstr "### 9.3 模型特定优化"
+
+msgid "| Optimization | Enablement | Benefit | Notes |"
+msgstr "| 优化项 | 启用方式 | 收益 | 备注 |"
+
+msgid ""
+"| Full decode ACLGraph | `--compilation-config '{\"cudagraph_mode\": "
+"\"FULL_DECODE_ONLY\"}'` | Reduces decode dispatch overhead. | Recommended "
+"when decode tokens are generated. |"
+msgstr ""
+"| 全解码ACLGraph | `--compilation-config '{\"cudagraph_mode\": "
+"\"FULL_DECODE_ONLY\"}'` | 减少解码调度开销。 | 在生成解码token时推荐使用。 |"
+
+msgid ""
+"| Piecewise ACLGraph | `--compilation-config '{\"cudagraph_mode\": "
+"\"PIECEWISE\"}'` | Enables segmented graph execution. | Supported when "
+"piecewise graph execution is required. |"
+msgstr ""
+"| 分段ACLGraph | `--compilation-config '{\"cudagraph_mode\": \"PIECEWISE\"}'` "
+"| 启用分段图执行。 | 在需要分段图执行时支持。 |"
+
+msgid ""
+"| Tensor parallelism | `--tensor-parallel-size` | Splits model computation "
+"across multiple NPUs. | Adjust according to model size and available "
+"devices. |"
+msgstr ""
+"| 张量并行 | `--tensor-parallel-size` | 将模型计算拆分到多个NPU上。 | 根据模型大小和可用设备调整。 |"
+
+msgid ""
+"| Expert parallelism | `--enable-expert-parallel` | Distributes experts for "
+"MoE variants. | Enable only for MoE deployment plans that use EP. |"
+msgstr ""
+"| 专家并行 | `--enable-expert-parallel` | 为MoE变体分配专家。 | 仅对使用EP的MoE部署计划启用。 |"
+
+msgid "## 10 FAQ"
+msgstr "## 10 常见问题"
+
+msgid ""
+"For common environment, installation, and general parameter issues, refer to"
+" [FAQs](../../faqs.md). This section only covers model-specific issues for "
+"Gemma4."
+msgstr "常见环境、安装和通用参数问题请参考[常见问题](../../faqs.md)。本节仅涵盖Gemma4的模型特定问题。"
+
+msgid "### Q1: Which execution mode should be used first?"
+msgstr "### Q1：应首先使用哪种执行模式？"
+
+msgid ""
+"**Phenomenon:** Users need to choose between eager mode and ACLGraph mode "
+"during initial deployment."
+msgstr "**现象：** 用户在初始部署时需要在eager模式和ACLGraph模式之间进行选择。"
+
+msgid ""
+"**Cause:** Eager mode is easier to use as a baseline, while ACLGraph mode is"
+" designed to reduce graph dispatch overhead during serving."
+msgstr "**原因：** Eager模式更易于作为基线使用，而ACLGraph模式旨在减少服务期间的图调度开销。"
+
+msgid ""
+"**Solution:** Use eager mode first to verify model loading and basic "
+"generation. After the baseline is confirmed, use ACLGraph mode with "
+"`FULL_DECODE_ONLY` for generation serving."
+msgstr ""
+"**解决方案：** "
+"首先使用eager模式验证模型加载和基础生成。确认基线后，使用带有`FULL_DECODE_ONLY`的ACLGraph模式进行生成服务。"
+
+msgid "### Q2: How should the model path be configured?"
+msgstr "### Q2：应如何配置模型路径？"
+
+msgid ""
+"**Phenomenon:** The service fails to start because the model path cannot be "
+"found or the wrong model is loaded."
+msgstr "**现象：** 由于找不到模型路径或加载了错误的模型，服务启动失败。"
+
+msgid ""
+"**Cause:** The examples use `/root/.cache/path/to/gemma4` as a placeholder."
+msgstr "**原因：** 示例中使用`/root/.cache/path/to/gemma4`作为占位符。"
+
+msgid ""
+"**Solution:** Replace `MODEL_PATH` and all benchmark or offline inference "
+"model paths with the actual local Gemma4 model directory."
+msgstr "**解决方案：** 将`MODEL_PATH`以及所有基准测试或离线推理模型路径替换为实际的本地Gemma4模型目录。"
+
+msgid "### Q3: How should Gemma4 MoE variants be deployed?"
+msgstr "### 问题3：如何部署Gemma4 MoE变体？"
+
+msgid ""
+"**Phenomenon:** Users need to decide whether to use tensor parallelism or "
+"expert parallelism for MoE variants."
+msgstr "**现象：** 用户需要决定对MoE变体使用张量并行还是专家并行。"
+
+msgid ""
+"**Cause:** MoE models can use different parallel strategies depending on "
+"model size, number of devices, and serving workload."
+msgstr "**原因：** MoE模型可根据模型大小、设备数量和服务工作负载采用不同的并行策略。"
+
+msgid ""
+"**Solution:** Start with the same tensor parallel configuration used for the"
+" baseline. If the deployment plan uses expert parallelism, add `--enable-"
+"expert-parallel` and compare throughput, latency, and memory usage under the"
+" same workload."
+msgstr ""
+"**解决方案：** 从基线使用的相同张量并行配置开始。如果部署计划使用专家并行，请添加 `--enable-expert-"
+"parallel`，并在相同工作负载下比较吞吐量、延迟和内存使用情况。"
